hero.title: Unknown Finds Direction
hero.subtitle: Redefine workflows: connect people, resources, and opportunities into sustainable outcome paths—turn collaboration from “talked” into “done.”

philosophy.title: Stars · Connection · Flow
poem: Stars scattered, lone lights struggle against the long night,
All things have spirit, yet trapped behind silent walls.
We draw the lines, threading the needle,
Gathering the points into a flowing riverbed.
No longer a pile of fragments, but the growth of wisdom,
Emerging in connection, flowing to the unknown distance.
StellarFlow, let value flow like water, naturally.

intro.title: What is StellarFlow?
intro.subtitle: A Value Network Connecting Islands
intro.desc: StellarFlow is a value chain network based on 'fractal visualization' and 'multi-agent collaboration'. It's not just a tool, but an ecosystem that connects scattered knowledge, connections, and needs (Stars) through smart contracts and visual paths (Flow).

items.title: From Chaos to Order
items.desc: Organize fragmented information and tasks into clear visual paths through fractal structures.

items.title: From Isolation to Symbiosis
items.desc: Break down barriers between departments and roles, allowing seamless collaboration across the value stream.

items.title: From Storage to Emergence
items.desc: Knowledge is no longer static storage, but reused and added value in flow, emerging new opportunities.

items.title: Knowledge Management
items.desc: Precipitate individual or team experience into standardized 'flows', ready for newcomers.

items.title: Agile Collaboration
items.desc: Find experts in the public domain, quickly form temporary teams, and settle automatically by results.

items.title: Idea Incubation
items.desc: Capture fleeting inspirations (Stars), associate existing resources, and hatch viable projects.

experience.title: Start Your Experience
experience.desc: No complex learning needed. Just follow your intuition: click, connect, flow.

footer.desc: Connect every tiny value, gather into a force that changes the world.
